case_title: VAZGEN KOSTANDYAN VS. JOSE AUGUSTO VILCHEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY KOSTANDYAN, VAZGEN AS TO DEFENDANT VILCHEZ, JOSE AUGUSTO FLYERS TRANSPORTATION, LLC FEDERATED SERVICE INSURANCE CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
